log.context:
Scan complete. Two minor issues found and fixed:

1. **`discord_ingest_act.py` — unbounded recursive retry on HTTP 429**: `_fetch_messages_page` called itself recursively on Discord rate-limit responses with no depth limit. Under sustained rate-limiting this would eventually stack-overflow. Converted to an iterative loop with a hard limit of 5 retries, raising a `RuntimeError` if exhausted.

2. **`clunger/src/index.ts` — no request body size limit**: `readBody()` accumulated incoming bytes with ...(truncated)
